fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Manufacturer Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the manufacturer of the catalog item.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor from whom you can purchase the catalog item.

fields.name: Vendor Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for this item.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the catalog item.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Published Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the published cost or vendor list price for the catalog item.

fields.name: Negotiated Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price you negotiated to pay for the catalog item.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight, including the weight of any packaging, of the catalog item.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of the item. The weight of packaging materials is not included.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the catalog item card was last modified.

fields.name: Bar Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bar code of the catalog item.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number that the program has generated for this catalog item.

fields.name: Item Templ. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the item template used for this catalog item.
